item.title: Form factor
item.description: Eurorack “spec”: http://www.doepfer.de/a100_man/a100m_e.htm Ikea RAST = 19x10.5 inch = two rows of 3U modules ATX PSU Wooden “rails”, modules are held with wood screws Front panels from mandarin crates
